subject: Geography
title: Arctic Amplification
description: A fast breakdown of Arctic Amplification for builders.

hook.text: The Arctic is warming nearly four times faster than the global average.

buildup.text: When white ice melts, it exposes dark ocean, which absorbs more heat, melting more ice.

discovery.text: This feedback loop is called 'Arctic amplification'—warming feeds on itself.

twist.text: September Arctic sea ice has shrunk by over 40% since satellite measurements began in 1979.

climax.text: Scientists predict ice-free Arctic summers as early as the 2030s.

punchline.text: The Arctic is turning the thermostat up on itself.

quiz.question: What is Arctic amplification?
options: A feedback loop where melting ice causes more warming
Sound traveling farther in cold air
